steps.title: Set up the conversion
steps.content: We are told that $1\text{ meter}=100\text{ centimeters}$, so multiply the number of meters by $100$ to get centimeters.

steps.title: Evaluate each choice
steps.content:
• A) $0.051$ — this is $51$ divided by $1000$, not multiplied by $100$. Eliminated.
  • B) $0.51$ — this divides by $100$ instead of multiplying. Eliminated.
  • C) $5{,}100$ — this equals $51\times 100$. Matches.
  • D) $51{,}000$ — this multiplies by $1000$, which would be the conversion to millimeters. Eliminated.
That matches choice C — C is correct.
